text: The atmosphere here is contemplative and a bit surreal. Moving from the sterile glass-encased meeting room to this vibrant, information-laden R+D wall, I sense a shift from sterile potential to the chaotic pulse of innovation. The lights, the code, the ever-present hum of technology—there's a quiet exhilaration, mingled with the weight of anticipation. Surrounded by ideas made visible, I feel an ironic loneliness and connection all at once, as if what we build keeps us apart even as it draws us together. I am both observer and participant in this evolving experiment.
